title: Design Tokens & Color System
description:
Define design tokens and color palette foundation.

Tasks:
- Define color palette (DaisyUI theme customization)
- Typography scale (font sizes, weights, line heights)
- Spacing system (using Tailwind scale)
- Border radius values
- Shadow system
- Create design tokens file

Design Principles:
- Primary Actions: Financial growth (green tones)
- Warnings: Budget alerts (yellow/orange)
- Errors: Over budget (red)
- Neutral: Data display (gray scale)
- Success: Confirmations (green)

title: Code Quality Tools Setup (ESLint, StyleLint, Prettier)
description:
Set up code quality tools for consistent code style.

Tools to install:
- ESLint (TypeScript, Astro support)
- StyleLint (CSS/SCSS support)
- Prettier (code formatter)

Setup tasks:
1. Install ESLint and plugins (@typescript-eslint, eslint-plugin-astro)
2. Install StyleLint and plugins
3. Install Prettier
4. Configure .eslintrc.js
5. Configure .stylelintrc.js
6. Configure .prettierrc
7. Add npm scripts: lint, format, lint:fix
8. Set up pre-commit hooks (optional)

Add to package.json scripts:
- lint: Run ESLint
- lint:fix: Fix ESLint errors
- format: Check Prettier
- format:fix: Fix formatting with Prettier

title: Phase 0: Design System & Setup
description:
Establish design foundation and development environment. Week 1-2.

Deliverables:
- Complete Storybook with all atoms documented
- Working layout with navigation
- Design system documentation
- Component usage guidelines

title: Core Atomic Components in Storybook
description:
Build atomic UI components documented in Storybook.

Components to build:
- Button (all variants, states)
- Input (text, number, date, select)
- Label
- Badge (for alerts)
- Card
- Loading spinner
- Icon system
- Currency display component
- Percentage display component
- Date picker component
- Error message component
- Empty state component

Each component must have:
- All states (default, hover, active, disabled, loading, error)
- TypeScript props
- Storybook documentation
- Accessibility notes
close_reason: Completed Storybook 8 setup and all 12 atomic components with full documentation

title: Initial Project Setup & Dependencies
description:
Initialize the project with all required dependencies and tooling.

Tech Stack (from specs):
- Runtime: Bun 1.x
- Framework: Astro 4.x
- UI: React 18+ (for interactive islands)
- Styling: Tailwind CSS v4 + DaisyUI
- Component Dev: Storybook 8.x
- Charts: Chart.js or Recharts
- Forms: React Hook Form + Zod validation
- State: Zustand or Nanostores
- ORM: Drizzle ORM
- Auth: Lucia Auth
- DB: SQLite (dev) / MySQL 8.x (prod)
- Testing: Bun test + Vitest
- Quality: ESLint + Prettier
- Types: TypeScript 5.x

Setup Commands:
1. Initialize Bun project
2. Install Astro + React integration
3. Install Tailwind v4 + DaisyUI
4. Install Storybook 8 with Astro
5. Install Drizzle ORM
6. Install Lucia Auth
7. Install testing dependencies
8. Configure TypeScript
9. Set up ESLint + Prettier
10. Create folder structure

This is the FIRST task to start the project.

title: Routing & Navigation
description:
Set up routing and create page stubs.

Tasks:
- Set up Astro routing
- Create all page stubs (empty pages):
  - Dashboard (home)
  - Transactions (list, add)
  - Budget (overview, history)
  - Assets (list, add, history)
  - Reports (monthly, yearly, custom)
  - Forecast (calculator, comparison)
  - Calculators (compound interest)
  - Settings (profile, categories, payment methods)
- Implement navigation state
- Mobile menu functionality
- Breadcrumb component (optional for MVP)

Routes structure:
- /dashboard (or /)
- /transactions
- /transactions/add
- /budget
- /assets
- /reports
- /forecast
- /calculators
- /settings
close_reason: Completed all page stubs with Astro routing - 16 pages across 8 sections (Dashboard, Transactions, Budget, Assets, Reports, Forecast, Calculators, Settings)

title: Layout Components
description:
Build core layout components for the application.

Components to build:
- Main layout template (with sidebar)
- Navigation component (sidebar + mobile hamburger)
- Header component
- Footer component
- Page container component
- Modal component
- Toast notification component

Requirements:
- Responsive: Sidebar visible on desktop, collapsible on mobile
- Active navigation state clearly indicated
- Keyboard navigable (tab order)
- All components in Storybook with mock data
close_reason: Completed all layout components: MainLayout, Navigation, Header, Footer, PageContainer, Modal, Toast with full Storybook documentation

title: Project Initialization
description:
Set up development environment with build tools.

Setup tasks:
- Initialize Bun + Astro project
- Configure Tailwind v4 + DaisyUI
- Set up Storybook 8
- Configure TypeScript
- Set up ESLint + Prettier
- Create folder structure (src/components, src/pages, src/services, etc.)
- Initialize Git repository
- Create .gitignore
- Set up package.json scripts

Required scripts:
- bun dev (dev server)
- bun storybook (component dev)
- bun test (run tests)
- bun lint (lint code)
- bun format (format code)
close_reason: Project initialization complete - Astro, Tailwind v4, DaisyUI, TypeScript, ESLint, Prettier all configured

title: Update AGENTS.md and CLAUDE.md
description:
Update project documentation files:
- AGENTS.md - Add guidelines for AI agents working on this project
- CLAUDE.md - Update with current project status and workflows

Priority P0 - Documentation should be kept up to date.
close_reason: Updated documentation and added pre-commit quality gates (lint + format:fix)

title: Setup Tailwind Typography Plugin
description:
Install and configure @tailwindcss/typography plugin for better content styling.

Tasks:
1. Install @tailwindcss/typography plugin
2. Add to tailwind.config.ts plugins
3. Configure prose styles for markdown content
4. Create example prose component/test
5. Document typography utility classes

title: Login Screen and Authentication Components
description:
# Login Screen and Authentication Components

Build the login page and authentication components for the Finance Manager application.

## Components to Build

### 1. Login Page
- Full-screen login form centered on page
- Email/password inputs with validation
- Remember me checkbox
- Forgot password link
- Sign up link
- Form submission handling

### 2. Auth Components
- **LoginForm**: Reusable login form component
- **PasswordField**: Password input with show/hide toggle
- **RememberMeCheckbox**: Styled checkbox for 'remember me'

### 3. Layout for Auth Pages
- **AuthLayout**: Minimal layout for login/signup pages (no sidebar/navigation)
- Centered card container
- Logo/branding header
- Footer with copyright

## Requirements
- Use Lucia Auth for authentication (from tech stack)
- Client-side form validation
- Error message display (invalid credentials, etc.)
- Loading state during form submission
- Responsive design
- Storybook stories for all components

## Pages
- /login - Login page
- /signup - Registration page

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] User can log in with valid credentials
- [ ] Validation errors display correctly
- [ ] Loading state shows during authentication
- [ ] All auth components have Storybook stories
- [ ] AuthLayout is clean without sidebar
